channel.title: WiFi Scanning on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in WiFi Scanning on simeononsecurity

item.title: Eye Spy: Passive Surveillance Detector for the M5Stack Atom Lite (ESP32)
item.category: "Privacy Tools" , "Counter-Surveillance" , "IoT Security" , "Embedded Systems" , "Security Research" , "WiFi Security" , "Bluetooth Security" , "ESP32 Projects" , "Hardware Security" , "Open Source Security"
item.description: A complete technical reference for Eye Spy v1.1 - an open-source passive BLE and WiFi surveillance detector running on the M5Stack Atom Lite (ESP32-PICO-D4) that scans for body cameras, ALPR systems, AirTags, drones, and hidden cameras using a confidence-score threat model and a single RGB LED.

item.title: DagShell Custom Firmware for Orbic RCL400: Complete Installation and Usage Guide 2026
item.category: "Custom Firmware" , "Mobile Security" , "Privacy Tools" , "Network Security" , "Wardriving" , "Penetration Testing" , "IoT Hacking" , "Security Research" , "Hardware Hacking" , "Privacy Technology"
item.description: Comprehensive guide to DagShell custom firmware for Orbic RCL400 hotspot including installation, privacy tools, hacking features, wardriving capabilities, and why it pairs perfectly with RayHunter for mobile security research.

item.title: Flock Safety Camera Surveillance: Prevalence, Privacy Concerns, and Protection Strategies in 2026
item.category: "Privacy Technology" , "Surveillance Systems" , "Digital Rights" , "Law Enforcement Technology" , "Privacy Protection" , "Counter Surveillance" , "Civil Liberties" , "Technology Ethics" , "Smart City Infrastructure" , "Security Hardware"
item.description: Discover the widespread deployment of Flock Safety ALPR cameras in 2026, understand the privacy implications, and learn effective counter-surveillance strategies including detection devices.

item.title: Flock-You Detection Project: Complete Counter-Surveillance Hardware and Setup Guide 2026
item.category: "Security Hardware" , "Counter Surveillance" , "Privacy Technology" , "Open Source Projects" , "ESP32 Development" , "WiFi Monitoring" , "Privacy Tools" , "Digital Rights" , "Hardware Hacking" , "Network Security"
item.description: Comprehensive technical guide to the open-source Flock-You project for detecting Flock Safety ALPR cameras using ESP32-based hardware. Includes setup instructions, firmware details, and purchasing options.
